arts.ttl: Managing Marcus Forss' injury return in what could prove a timely Middlesbrough boost
arts.sum: Dael Fry is, like Forss, being managed after a long-term injury but has now been back training for over a fortnight. Michael Carrick says Middlesbrough have to manage Marcus Forss return carefully, with the Boro boss desperate not to risk the Finn too early.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick speaks out on potential Middlesbrough changes against Sheffield United
arts.sum: But as far as giving ourselves the best chance over a long period, we’re doing a lot of good things." With Carrick and his players offered a swift opportunity to get back on track on Wednesday evening when Chris Wilder's Sheffield United visit, the potential for personnel changes to try and illicit a change in fortunes, particularly concerning finishing chances.

Ninth-placed Middlesbrough host Sheffield United, currently fourth, on Wednesday evening. Both teams head into midweek after suffering 2-0 defeats last weekend. Boro were defeated at the Riverside Stadium by Bristol City, whilst the Blades were soundly beaten at Elland Road by Leeds United. This game also marks Chris Wilder’s return to his former club where […] The post Middlesbrough vs Sheffield United – Preview appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink makes Middlesbrough Premier League claim as promotion race hots up
arts.sum: Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink says Middlesbrough should be a Premier League club - and is backing Michael Carrick to get them there. Now in their eighth season without top-flight football - their longest absence in 50 years - Boro continue to push hard to make that jump in what is an increasingly difficult bridge to gap.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder reflects on his time at Middlesbrough with both pride and disappointment
arts.sum: Though his time at the club came to an end a little over two years ago after a disappointing start to the 2021-22 season, he holds no hard feelings, with his only disappointment that he didn't manage to make a bigger success of it. Wilder spent a little over a year in charge of Boro and initially oversaw a big turnaround in results as well as some special evenings in the FA Cup .

arts.ttl: ‘Gets his revenge’ – Middlesbrough vs Sheffield United prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Middlesbrough vs Sheffield United predictions ahead of their Championship clash on Wednesday evening. The post ‘Gets his revenge’ – Middlesbrough vs Sheffield United prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Sammy Silvera challenge issued as Middlesbrough loanee shows 'glimmers' at Portsmouth
arts.sum: There have been a couple of games where he’s looked our biggest attacking threat and there have probably been some games we haven’t quite seen that, so it’s just about getting that consistency with him. Portsmouth boss John Mousinho has challenged Sammy Silvera add more end product to his game after only seeing glimpses of what he's capable of so far.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder is sure of one thing ahead of Middlesbrough return with Sheffield United
arts.sum: “We've had a fabulous run, but it wasn't our night tonight,” said Wilder at Leeds. Chris Wilder is certain his side will have the character to respond to their first defeat of the season, tipping them to 'come back roaring' at Middlesbrough on Wednesday evening.
